title: cyphostemma leandrii
intro: Cyphostemma leandrii, also known as the "Euphorb", is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family, native to Madagascar. The medicinal properties of Cyphostemma leandrii have been utilized in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Cyphostemma leandrii is often used in tea or decoction form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
